name: ZOO Digital Group plc
summary: ZOO Digital Group plc, through its subsidiaries, provides cloud-based localization and digital distribution services in the United Kingdom and the United States. It operates through three segments: Localisation, Digital Packaging, and Software Solutions. The company offers subtitling, dubbing, scripting, subtitling for commercials, and closed captioning services, as well as localization of artwork and metadata, and editing of compliance; digital packaging and asset management services; and distributes TV and movie contents. Its cloud platforms include ZOOsubs, a cloud-based platform for producing, managing, and converting subtitles and captions; ZOOdubs, a cloud-based platform for offering dubbing services; ZOOscreen, a platform for screening, sharing, and showcasing TV and movie content; ZOOcore, a workflow management platform for managing projects and people; ZOOhive, a platform for preparing and repackaging assets for various digital distribution channels; ZOOvault, a central place to store, search, and download assets; and ZOOstudio platform, which manages the requirement for delivery of assets for over the top distribution. The company also engages in the media production and technology development activities; and sells and distributes technology products. It serves studios, broadcasters, online retailers, and over-the-top distributors. ZOO Digital Group plc was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Sheffield, the United Kingdom.
